globe: gently. it has been turning for four and a half billion years without your help.
the world does not spin faster for anyone. except, apparently, you.
click: clicking harder has never once worked for me either.
that part of the page is just paint. I checked.
nothing is broken. between us, that surprises me too.
toggle: day, night, day, night. you alright?
the sun does not negotiate. the toggle, clearly, does.
save: you cannot save me. only I can do that.
resize: I tested this layout on every width except the one you just found.
responsive design, they said. it builds character, they said.
copy: take it. I took most of my best lines from better books.
copied. attribution is between you and your gods.
return: the cells kept living while you were gone. none of them noticed.
idle: I was not waiting. the page, however, never stopped.
print: pressing a turning world onto dead trees. bold.
name: still my name. I checked.
yes, both of those are real words. ask my village.
snake: it plays itself. there is a way in, but it is smaller than you think.
it has died many times. it keeps its own counsel about it.
paper: that was the last one. the rest are still being lived.
contact: go on. the first line is the hardest, I would know.
